about.title: About ProBook Solutions
about.description: ProBook Solutions is led by Emad Shenouda, an experienced financial manager and bookkeeper with over 23 years of expertise in accounting across U.S. and Middle Eastern organizations. Specialized in QuickBooks Desktop and Online, as well as Zoho Books, Xero, and NetSuite, Emad has a passion for streamlining accounting systems, conducting financial analysis, and improving reporting accuracy. Fluent in English and Arabic, he offers personalized accounting solutions to startups and SMEs worldwide.
skills: Excel, Google Workspace, Slack, Notion, Asana

services.title: Our Services
services.intro: We provide comprehensive accounting and financial management services designed to help your business grow and prosper.

list.title: Bookkeeping & Financial Reporting
list.description: Accurate and timely bookkeeping, month-end and year-end closing, and comprehensive financial reporting including P&L, balance sheets, and cash flow statements.

list.title: Business Setup & Chart of Accounts
list.description: Establish your accounting foundation with a customized chart of accounts and support for new business setups, ensuring compliance and clarity from day one.

list.title: Software Integration & Support
list.description: Seamless integration and customization of QuickBooks, Zoho, Xero, and NetSuite to match your workflows and reporting needs.

list.title: E‑commerce Accounting
list.description: Specialized accounting for online sellers, including integration with Amazon, Shopify, and other platforms, inventory tracking, and sales reporting.

list.title: Training & Consulting
list.description: Personalized one‑on‑one or group training sessions for your accounting team on software usage, financial management best practices, and process optimization.

items.q: Do you work with both startups and SMEs?
items.a: Yes. We tailor bookkeeping, reporting, and advisory to each stage of growth.

items.q: Which accounting software do you support?
items.a: QuickBooks (Desktop & Online), Zoho Books, Xero, and NetSuite.

items.q: Can you help clean up historic books?
items.a: Absolutely. We audit, reconcile, and standardize your chart of accounts and data.

resources.title: Resources & Insights
resources.intro: Stay informed with our latest articles, case studies, and downloadable templates designed to help you manage your finances more effectively.

articles.title: Choosing the Right Accounting Software for Your Startup
articles.snippet: A guide to selecting the best accounting platform—QuickBooks, Zoho, Xero, or NetSuite—based on your business needs.

articles.title: 5 Tips for Streamlining Your Bookkeeping
articles.snippet: Simple strategies to improve the accuracy and efficiency of your daily accounting tasks.

articles.title: Understanding Financial Statements
articles.snippet: Learn how to read and interpret key financial reports to make smarter business decisions.

integrations.title: Technology & Integrations
integrations.subtitle: We work with the tools you already use. Our expertise spans leading accounting platforms, e-commerce systems, payment processors, and business management software.
integrations.capabilities_title: What We Can Do With Your Tech Stack
integrations.dont_see_desc: We're always expanding our integration capabilities. If you use a platform not listed here, let's discuss how we can work with your existing tools or recommend alternatives.

quickbooks_desktop.desc: Enterprise, Pro, Premier. 20+ years of expertise in setup, migration, and optimization.

quickbooks_online.desc: Cloud-based accounting with real-time collaboration. Advanced ProAdvisor certified.

xero.desc: Modern cloud accounting for small businesses. Certified Xero partner with proven implementations.

zoho_books.desc: Affordable cloud accounting with CRM integration. Expert in setup and customization.

netsuite.desc: Enterprise ERP for complex organizations. Financial management and reporting expertise.

odoo.desc: Open-source ERP with accounting module. Implementation and configuration support.

shopify.desc: Sales reconciliation, inventory sync, and multi-channel reporting.

amazon.desc: FBA accounting, fee breakdowns, inventory tracking, and sales reports.

target_plus.desc: Vendor portal integration for sales tracking and reconciliation.

walmart.desc: Seller account reconciliation and multi-channel inventory management.

woocommerce.desc: WordPress e-commerce integration with accounting systems.

bigcommerce.desc: Enterprise e-commerce platform with advanced reporting needs.

stripe.desc: Transaction reconciliation, fee tracking, and revenue recognition.

square.desc: POS and online payment reconciliation, inventory sync.

paypal.desc: Transaction import, fee allocation, and multi-currency support.

authorize_net.desc: Payment gateway integration for transaction tracking.

dear_inventory.desc: Advanced inventory management with manufacturing and multi-location support.

cin7.desc: Omnichannel inventory and order management system integration.

tradegecko.desc: Inventory and order management for wholesale and retail.

shipstation.desc: Shipping cost tracking and fulfillment reconciliation.

bill_com.desc: AP automation, bill approvals, and payment processing.

expensify.desc: Expense report automation and receipt management.

ramp.desc: Corporate card and expense management platform.

brex.desc: Startup-focused corporate card with built-in expense tracking.

google_workspace.desc: Gmail, Drive, Sheets for document sharing and collaboration.

slack.desc: Real-time communication for quick questions and updates.

asana.desc: Project management for tracking deliverables and deadlines.

notion.desc: Documentation, wiki, and knowledge base management.

microsoft_excel.desc: Advanced spreadsheet analysis, pivot tables, and financial modeling.

google_sheets.desc: Cloud-based spreadsheets for collaborative financial analysis.
